mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.name as coach_name FROM coach_schedule s LEFT JOIN coach c ON s.coach_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
SELECT s.*, c.name as coach_name FROM coach_schedule s LEFT JOIN coach c ON s.coach_id = c.id WHERE s.coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY s.schedule_date DESC, s.start_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coach_schedule (coach_id, schedule_date, start_time, end_time, status, type, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{coachId}, #{scheduleDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{type}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE coach_schedule SET coach_id = #{coachId}, schedule_date = #{scheduleDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, type = #{type}, description = #{description}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
